worth_tracking.title: OpenAI：three of the things we are most excited about:
worth_tracking.brief: three of the things we are most excited about:。先放在观察位，等更多证据出现后再判断它的行业分量。
worth_tracking.social_original_text:
three of the things we are most excited about:

1. AGI accelerating research
2. AGI accelerating companies
3. personal AGI accelerating everyone in achieving their goals

today it was great to announce the unit distance result.

yesterday it was great to announce that we are offering to invest $2M in openai credits into every YC company.

now we need to increase our efforts on the third!
worth_tracking.translation_zh:
我们最兴奋的三件事：

1. AGI 加速研究
2. AGI 加速公司发展
3. 个人 AGI 帮助每个人实现自己的目标

今天很高兴宣布 unit distance 结果。

昨天也很高兴宣布，我们愿意向每一家 YC 公司投入 200 万美元的 OpenAI credits。

现在我们需要在第三件事上加大投入！
evidence_titles: three of the things we are most excited about:
evidence_summaries:
three of the things we are most excited about:

1. AGI accelerating research
2. AGI accelerating companies
3. personal AGI accelerating everyone in achieving their goals

today it was great to announce the unit distance result.

yesterday it was great to announce that we are offering to invest $2M in openai credits into every YC company.

now we need to increase our efforts on the third!

worth_tracking.title: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
worth_tracking.brief: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
worth_tracking.social_original_text:
Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

When your agents need to search the web, accept no substitutes. https://t.co/3LtJucCenk
worth_tracking.translation_zh:
Exa 是我给所有 Agent 最信任的工具。我们在 YC 用它，在我的所有 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 里也用它。没有别的选择能同时做到这么快、这么可靠、这么完整。

当你的 Agent 需要搜索 Web 时，不要接受任何替代品。
evidence_titles: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
evidence_summaries:
Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

When your agents need to search the web, accept no substitutes. https://t.co/3LtJucCenk

worth_tracking.title: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
worth_tracking.brief: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
worth_tracking.social_original_text:
very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.

seeing a very direct correlation with model performance and agent lab revenue, discontinuity in Q4 2025

(clip from @patrickc's stripe sessions)
worth_tracking.translation_zh:
虽然说得很晚，但回头看，@sama 那句神话般的“做一个会随着模型变强而变得更好的业务”，基本上就是我在这里说的 Agent Labs。

现在能看到模型性能和 Agent Lab 收入之间非常直接的相关性，并且在 2025 年第四季度出现了一个不连续跃迁。

（片段来自 @patrickc 的 Stripe Sessions）
evidence_titles: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
evidence_summaries:
very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.

seeing a very direct correlation with model performance and agent lab revenue, discontinuity in Q4 2025

(clip from @patrickc's stripe sessions)

worth_tracking.title: a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics.
worth_tracking.brief: a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics。先放在观察位，等更多证据出现后再判断它的行业分量。
worth_tracking.social_original_text:
a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics.

we'll be saying this a lot over the coming years, but this is a kinda big milestone.

i'm very excited for AI to greatly extend our understanding of the world, but still, i have complicated feelings today. https://t.co/IpmClBfPKQ
worth_tracking.translation_zh:
一个通用模型解决了数学中的一个重大开放问题。

未来几年我们会经常说到这类事情，但这确实是一个相当重要的里程碑。

我非常期待 AI 极大扩展我们对世界的理解，但即便如此，我今天的心情仍然很复杂。
evidence_titles: a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics.
evidence_summaries:
a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics.

we'll be saying this a lot over the coming years, but this is a kinda big milestone.

i'm very excited for AI to greatly extend our understanding of the world, but still, i have complicated feelings today. https://t.co/IpmClBfPKQ

worth_tracking.title: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th
worth_tracking.brief: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th。先放在观察位，等更多证据出现后再判断它的行业分量。
worth_tracking.social_original_text:
Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask themselves "is it really worth it".

Starting a company is so glorified - but building, scaling and maintaining one is a different story. This is why it's so important to do this for the right reasons - solve problems you are deeply passionate about and one you'll do even if the world is against you. At least there will be light at the end of the tunnel that's constantly drawing you in on those days when you are questioning your motivation.

I have never had the courage to personally start a company for this reason. Just wanted to say to the ones going through this - I see you, I salute you and I admire you 🫡
worth_tracking.translation_zh:
做创始人真的太难了，几乎每天都像在嚼玻璃。失败了没人关心；成功了又会得到更多问题。有时我真想知道，有多少创始人早上醒来会问自己：“这真的值得吗？”

创办公司被过度美化了，但真正去建设、扩张和维持一家公司是另一回事。所以因为正确的理由去做这件事非常重要：解决你真正热爱的、即使全世界都反对你也愿意继续做的问题。至少在那些你质疑自己动力的日子里，隧道尽头还有一道光一直吸引你向前。

正因为这个原因，我一直没有勇气亲自创办一家公司。只是想对正在经历这些的人说：我看见你们，我向你们致敬，也很佩服你们 🫡
evidence_titles: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th
evidence_summaries:
Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask themselves "is it really worth it".

Starting a company is so glorified - but building, scaling and maintaining one is a different story. This is why it's so important to do this for the right reasons - solve problems you are deeply passionate about and one you'll do even if the world is against you. At least there will be light at the end of the tunnel that's constantly drawing you in on those days when you are questioning your motivation.

I have never had the courage to personally start a company for this reason. Just wanted to say to the ones going through this - I see you, I salute you and I admire you 🫡

industry_views.title: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th
industry_views.brief: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th。先放在观察位，等更多证据出现后再判断它的行业分量。
industry_views.social_original_text:
Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask themselves "is it really worth it".

Starting a company is so glorified - but building, scaling and maintaining one is a different story. This is why it's so important to do this for the right reasons - solve problems you are deeply passionate about and one you'll do even if the world is against you. At least there will be light at the end of the tunnel that's constantly drawing you in on those days when you are questioning your motivation.

I have never had the courage to personally start a company for this reason. Just wanted to say to the ones going through this - I see you, I salute you and I admire you 🫡
industry_views.translation_zh:
做创始人真的太难了，几乎每天都像在嚼玻璃。失败了没人关心；成功了又会得到更多问题。有时我真想知道，有多少创始人早上醒来会问自己：“这真的值得吗？”

创办公司被过度美化了，但真正去建设、扩张和维持一家公司是另一回事。所以因为正确的理由去做这件事非常重要：解决你真正热爱的、即使全世界都反对你也愿意继续做的问题。至少在那些你质疑自己动力的日子里，隧道尽头还有一道光一直吸引你向前。

正因为这个原因，我一直没有勇气亲自创办一家公司。只是想对正在经历这些的人说：我看见你们，我向你们致敬，也很佩服你们 🫡
evidence_titles: Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask th
evidence_summaries:
Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask themselves "is it really worth it".

Starting a company is so glorified - but building, scaling and maintaining one is a different story. This is why it's so important to do this for the right reasons - solve problems you are deeply passionate about and one you'll do even if the world is against you. At least there will be light at the end of the tunnel that's constantly drawing you in on those days when you are questioning your motivation.

I have never had the courage to personally start a company for this reason. Just wanted to say to the ones going through this - I see you, I salute you and I admire you 🫡

items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: OpenAI：three of the things we are most excited about:
items.brief: three of the things we are most excited about:。先放在观察位，等更多证据出现后再判断它的行业分量。
items.social_original_text:
three of the things we are most excited about:

1. AGI accelerating research
2. AGI accelerating companies
3. personal AGI accelerating everyone in achieving their goals

today it was great to announce the unit distance result.

yesterday it was great to announce that we are offering to invest $2M in openai credits into every YC company.

now we need to increase our efforts on the third!
items.translation_zh:
我们最兴奋的三件事：

1. AGI 加速研究
2. AGI 加速公司发展
3. 个人 AGI 帮助每个人实现自己的目标

今天很高兴宣布 unit distance 结果。

昨天也很高兴宣布，我们愿意向每一家 YC 公司投入 200 万美元的 OpenAI credits。

现在我们需要在第三件事上加大投入！
evidence_titles: three of the things we are most excited about:
evidence_summaries:
three of the things we are most excited about:

1. AGI accelerating research
2. AGI accelerating companies
3. personal AGI accelerating everyone in achieving their goals

today it was great to announce the unit distance result.

yesterday it was great to announce that we are offering to invest $2M in openai credits into every YC company.

now we need to increase our efforts on the third!

items.title: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
items.brief: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
items.social_original_text:
Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

When your agents need to search the web, accept no substitutes. https://t.co/3LtJucCenk
items.translation_zh:
Exa 是我给所有 Agent 最信任的工具。我们在 YC 用它，在我的所有 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 里也用它。没有别的选择能同时做到这么快、这么可靠、这么完整。

当你的 Agent 需要搜索 Web 时，不要接受任何替代品。
evidence_titles: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
evidence_summaries:
Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

When your agents need to search the web, accept no substitutes. https://t.co/3LtJucCenk

items.title: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
items.brief: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
items.social_original_text:
very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.

seeing a very direct correlation with model performance and agent lab revenue, discontinuity in Q4 2025

(clip from @patrickc's stripe sessions)
items.translation_zh:
虽然说得很晚，但回头看，@sama 那句神话般的“做一个会随着模型变强而变得更好的业务”，基本上就是我在这里说的 Agent Labs。

现在能看到模型性能和 Agent Lab 收入之间非常直接的相关性，并且在 2025 年第四季度出现了一个不连续跃迁。

（片段来自 @patrickc 的 Stripe Sessions）
evidence_titles: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
evidence_summaries:
very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.

seeing a very direct correlation with model performance and agent lab revenue, discontinuity in Q4 2025

(clip from @patrickc's stripe sessions)

items.social_original_text:
a general-purpose model solved a major open problem in mathematics.

we'll be saying this a lot over the coming years, but this is a kinda big milestone.

i'm very excited for AI to greatly extend our understanding of the world, but still, i have complicated feelings today. https://t.co/IpmClBfPKQ
items.translation_zh:
一个通用模型解决了数学中的一个重大开放问题。

未来几年我们会经常说到这类事情，但这确实是一个相当重要的里程碑。

我非常期待 AI 极大扩展我们对世界的理解，但即便如此，我今天的心情仍然很复杂。

items.social_original_text:
Being a founder is so freaking hard man.. chewing glass every day. If you fail, no one cares. If you succeed, you are given way more problems. Sometimes I really wonder how many founders wake up in the morning and ask themselves "is it really worth it".

Starting a company is so glorified - but building, scaling and maintaining one is a different story. This is why it's so important to do this for the right reasons - solve problems you are deeply passionate about and one you'll do even if the world is against you. At least there will be light at the end of the tunnel that's constantly drawing you in on those days when you are questioning your motivation.

I have never had the courage to personally start a company for this reason. Just wanted to say to the ones going through this - I see you, I salute you and I admire you 🫡

创办公司被过度美化了，但真正去建设、扩张和维持一家公司是另一回事。所以因为正确的理由去做这件事非常重要：解决你真正热爱的、即使全世界都反对你也愿意继续做的问题。至少在那些你质疑自己动力的日子里，隧道尽头还有一道光一直吸引你向前。

正因为这个原因，我一直没有勇气亲自创办一家公司。只是想对正在经历这些的人说：我看见你们，我向你们致敬，也很佩服你们 🫡
